audience: Gamers and collectors who want a cute custom card game that feels like a secret drop
creative_direction: Real printed Card-o-Bot deck lying completely flat on a clean modern coffee table in a lived-in 2026 apartment with soft e-girl / light cyberpunk vibes (LED accents, cute tech, soft pink/cyan glow) that still feels like a real nice home today. Not messy. Not a void studio. Physics: every card is horizontal on the table surface like a real deck after a deal. One custom FRONT face-up flat on top of / in front of a full neat deck stack (also flat). Forbidden: floating cards, standing cards, leaning cards, propped cards, cards on edge, cards held upright against the deck. Photoreal. No campaign text in the image.

products.name: Apartment Deck Hero
products.asset_hint: Image 1 is the custom FRONT. Other images are official backs. Full neat deck lying flat on a coffee table in a nice modern gamer apartment (soft e-girl cyberpunk accents, lived-in but clean). The FRONT is face-up and completely horizontal on the table, slightly overlapping or just in front of a thick flat stack of backs. Gravity applies: cards rest on the wood, never lean, prop, stand, or float. Soft daylight plus subtle neon accents. Photoreal. No text.
products.notes: Physical deck in real apartment. Full stack. Flat on table.
